whatsapp.defaultMessage: Hello Justine, I would like to know more about your creations.

about.heroSubtitle: A passion transformed into an art of living
about.heroTagline: Founded in Yaoundé, shining to the world
about.storyPara1: Born from a deep passion for fashion and African textile heritage, Justine Kem's is a couture house founded in Yaoundé, Cameroon, with the ambition of celebrating every woman through unique and refined creations.
about.storyPara2: Guided by an exceptional attention to detail, our atelier blends international haute couture techniques with the richness of African textiles — wax, kente, bazin riche — to create pieces that transcend cultures and generations.
about.storyPara3: Today, Justine Kem's dresses women on four continents, from Douala to Paris, from Dakar to Toronto, with the same demand for artisanal perfection.
about.value1Desc: Every piece is handcrafted with meticulous precision, respecting the traditions of haute couture.
about.value2Desc: We celebrate the richness of African textiles and craftsmanship by elevating them to contemporary luxury.
about.value3Desc: No two clients are alike. Every creation is tailored to your morphology, tastes and story.
about.value4Desc: From Africa to the world, we deliver Cameroonian elegance to over 10 countries.
about.teamDesc: A team of passionate professionals at the service of your elegance
about.ctaDesc: Book a consultation with our team and let us create your unique piece.

metadata.title: Sewing & Fashion Design Training in Yaoundé - Justine Kem's
metadata.description: Learn the art of haute couture. Certifying training for beginners, intermediates, and professionals. Become a fashion designer.

hero.title:
Become a Professional
Fashion Designer
hero.subtitle: Certifying training with Justine Kem, with more than {exp} years of expertise

profil.name: Justine Kem
profil.quote: "I am committed to transmitting the secrets of African and European elegance. Every student will leave with the tools to excel — technically and professionally."

f1.title: Introduction to Sewing
f1.desc: Master the absolute basics of sewing — reading patterns, measurements, using the sewing machine — in 4 months of intensive practice.

f2.title: Advanced Sewing & African Fabrics
f2.desc: Perfect your technique with African fabrics (wax, bazin, kente) and discover the secrets of Cameroonian haute couture making.

f3.title: Fashion Designer Entrepreneur Training
f3.desc: From studio to company: develop your brand, create your collections, manage an atelier, and access a network of premium clients.

s1.title: Contact us
s1.desc: Via WhatsApp or the form below — we respond in less than 24h.

s2.title: Discovery interview
s2.desc: Free 30 min session to evaluate your current level and goals.

s3.title: Enrollment & payment
s3.desc: Choose your program and pay in one or several installments.

s4.title: Start your journey
s4.desc: Join your group and start creating from the first week!

t1.name: Mariette Ngono
t1.text: In 4 months, I went from zero to creating my own evening dresses. Justine teaches with infinite patience and contagious passion!

t2.name: Claudia Biya
t2.text: The training gave me all the keys to open my own atelier in Douala. The entrepreneurship module was particularly valuable.

t3.name: Amina Traoré
t3.text: I now sell my creations online in Paris and Abidjan. Justine taught me to believe in my talent and make a business out of it.

q1.q: Do I need sewing basics to enroll?
q1.a: No! Our Introduction training is specially designed for people without any experience. We welcome absolute beginners.

q2.q: Are the trainings in-person or online?
q2.a: The trainings are mainly in-person at our Yaoundé atelier. We also offer online sessions for some theoretical modules.

q3.q: Is there a certificate at the end of the training?
q3.a: Yes! Each training concludes with a Justine Kem's certificate of achievement, recognized in the fashion sector in Cameroon and internationally.

q4.a: Absolutely. We offer payment facilities in 2 or 3 monthly installments without additional fees. Contact us to discuss it.

q5.q: What does the 12-month Professional training include?
q5.a: The full training includes: advanced technical courses, business management courses, practical internships in the atelier, access to our client network, and support in launching your brand.

q6.q: When does the next session start?
q6.a: Enrollment for the next session of September 2025 is open. Places are limited to 8 students per group for optimal follow-up. Enroll now to reserve your spot.

ctaFinal.title: Ready to launch your career?
ctaFinal.desc: Places limited to {count} students per group. Don't miss your chance.

hero.title:
The story behind
every seam
hero.subtitle: From passion to excellence, from Yaoundé to the world.

story.ch1Desc: Born from an early passion for fabrics and creation, Justine Kem's began her journey in the fashion world as a teenager. Trained in traditional Cameroonian sewing techniques and later enriched by European influences, she quickly developed a unique signature blending African heritage with timeless elegance.
story.ch2Desc: Creating pieces that tell a story, that of the woman wearing them. Each Justine Kem's creation is designed to enhance the unique personality of her client, far from fast-fashion standards. The goal: a bespoke wardrobe where every piece becomes iconic.
story.ch3Desc: Rooted in Yaoundé while shining internationally, Justine Kem's is committed to ethical fashion: high-quality fabrics, local craftsmanship, total transparency in the creation process, and the transmission of know-how through our professional training programs.

values.title: Our values
values.v1Desc: Every stitch is made with meticulous precision, with no compromise on quality.
values.v2Desc: Our creations draw from African heritage to offer unique and meaningful pieces.
values.v3Desc: Sharing our expertise to train the next generation of African designers.

cta.title: Ready to create your unique piece?
cta.desc: Join hundreds of clients who trust us.

metadata.title: Testimonials | Justine Kem's Atelier
metadata.description: Discover authentic reviews and testimonials from our clients across the world — Cameroon, France, Europe, and the African diaspora.

hero.title: Client Stories
hero.desc: Hundreds of women around the world have entrusted their dreams to Justine Kem's. Here is what they say.

f1.name: Serena B.
f1.content: Justine was able to create the dress of my dreams for my wedding. The attention to detail is simply incredible. Every fold, every embroidery tells a story. I recommend her with my eyes closed.

f2.name: Marie-Claire K.
f2.content: Exemplary professionalism. The finishes are worthy of the greatest European couture houses. My outfit for my daughter's baptism was perfect from the first fitting.

f3.name: Inès T.
f3.content: Even from afar, the communication and measurements were perfect. My dress arrived impeccablement packed from Yaoundé. The quality dazzled all my guests.

f4.name: Amina D.
f4.content: I was looking for someone capable of marrying African fabrics with a modern style. Justine exceeded all my expectations. My wax merged with lace — a masterpiece.

f5.name: Fatou N.
f5.content: Fast, precise, and talented. I placed an order from Senegal and everything went smoothly. The event dress I received was beyond my expectations.

f6.name: Céline A.
f6.content: Justine's atelier is excellence in every stitch. My outfit for the traditional ceremony won everyone over. Thank you for the advice and the gentleness with which you worked.
